com.newland.nsdk.core.api.internal.serialportmanager

Interface SerialPort

  • All Known Subinterfaces:
    USBSerialPort

    public interface SerialPort
    Provides the ability to communicate with devices on serial ports.

    To get the instance of this module should use SerialPortManager.createInstance(SerialPortType, SerialPortSettings) to create.

    For Example:

         SerialPortManager serialPortManager = (SerialPortManager) NSDKModuleManagerImpl.getInstance().getModule(ModuleType.SERIAL_PORT_MANAGER);
     //Configs of serial port
     SerialPortSettings portSettings = new SerialPortSettings(BaudRate.115200, DataBits.DATA_BIT_8, ParityBit.NO_CHECK, StopBits.STOP_BIT_ONE, true);
     SerialPort serialPort = serialPortManager.createInstance(SerialPortType.RS232, portSettings);

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods Deprecated Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description

      For U2000 devices to awake external device.
      void close()
      Close the device's serial port.

      Clear the data in cache buffer.

      Gets external power supply configuration

      Returns the port type of current serial port.

      Deprecated. 
      void open()
      Open device serial port.
      byte[] read(int length, int timeoutMs)
      Read port data within timeout.
      int readLen()
      Obtain the amount of data in the port buffer.
      void setConfig(SerialPortSettings settings)
      Sets the config of port.
      void setHardwareFlowControl(boolean enableFlowControl)
      Set the hardware flow control property for the serial port.
      int write(byte[] data, int timeoutMs)
      Write data into serial port within timeout.

    • Method Detail

      • setConfig

        void setConfig(SerialPortSettings settings)
        throws NSDKException
        Sets the config of port.

        Note: For SerialPortType.PINPAD or SerialPortType.RS232, this shall be call before "open()". For SerialPortType.USB, this shall be used after "open()".

        Parameters:
        settings - The configurations set to serial port.
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • setHardwareFlowControl

        void setHardwareFlowControl(boolean enableFlowControl)
                     throws NSDKException
        Set the hardware flow control property for the serial port. This is only used in U2000 devices now.
        Parameters:
        enableFlowControl - Whether to enable hardware flow control. Use 'true' to enable it and 'false' to disable it. Enabling hardware flow control makes CTS (Clear To Send) and DTS (Data Terminal Ready) signals effective.
        Throws:
        NSDKException - if an exception occurs while setting the hardware flow control property.

      • awakeExternalDevice

        void awakeExternalDevice()
                  throws NSDKException
        For U2000 devices to awake external device.
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • getExternalPowerSupply

        boolean getExternalPowerSupply()
                        throws NSDKException
        Gets external power supply configuration
        Returns:
        Whether support external power supply or not.
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • open

        void open()
   throws NSDKException
        Open device serial port.
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • flush

        void flush()
    throws NSDKException
        Clear the data in cache buffer.
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • read

        byte[] read(int length,
            int timeoutMs)
     throws NSDKException
        Read port data within timeout.
        Parameters:
        length - [Required] The length of data you want to read in serial port.
          USB:supports no more than 2048 bytes data.
          RS232:supports no more than 2048 bytes data.
          PINPAD:supports no moer than 512 bytes data.
        timeoutMs - [Required] Timeout(ms), 0~20000 ms(For PINPAD, timeout shall be > 0).Only if SerialPortSettings.isBlocked is true, timeout makes sense.
        Returns:
        The data which is read from serial port within timeout.
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • readLen

        int readLen()
     throws NSDKException
        Obtain the amount of data in the port buffer.

        Note: This can only used when the data operation is not more than 2048.

        Returns:
        The amount of data in the port buffer.
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • write

        int write(byte[] data,
          int timeoutMs)
   throws NSDKException
        Write data into serial port within timeout.

        Note: For SerialPortType.PINPAD, there is no differences between blocking and no-blocking.

        Parameters:
        data - [Required] The data to be written to serial port.
          USB:supports no more than 2048 bytes data.
          RS232:supports no more than 2048 bytes data.
          PINPAD:supports no moer than 512 bytes data.
        timeoutMs - [Required] Timeout(ms), 0~20000 ms. Only if SerialPortSettings.isBlocked is true, timeout makes sense.
        Returns:
        The length of data written to the serial port successfully. When serialPortType is PINPAD, it will always be -1.
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • getPortType

        SerialPortType getPortType()
                    throws NSDKException
        Returns the port type of current serial port.
        Returns:
        Type of the current serial port.
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • ioctl

        @Deprecated
int ioctl(int cmd,
                       byte[] args)
                throws NSDKException
        Deprecated. 
        Operates device's driver.

        Note: This interface is reserved for expandable functions and PINPAD is not support this interface.

        Parameters:
        cmd - [Required] The command to operate device's driver.
        args - [Optional] The arguments of each command, which maybe not needs to input.
        Returns:
        The result of operation to device's driver.
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • close

        void close()
    throws NSDKException
        Close the device's serial port.
        Throws:
        NSDKException
